With Chief Sullivan were Chief OF

Sullivan said that reports had


come to him that speakers had
been saying harsh things about the


police and himself personally. and


that this had to stop or he would


arrest the whole bunch and end


their street speaking. Among other
things the chief said one speaker


had called him "a long stream or
misery"


Chief OF Detectives Burns testi-
fled that he had heard one speaker

Bones. chief of the detectives and
